mapper.sql: select comment_id, resource_id, course_id, node_id, user_id, user_name, parent_id, root_id, content, status, like_count, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from sc_resource_comment
mapper.insert: insert into sc_resource_comment(resource_id, course_id, node_id, user_id, user_name, parent_id, root_id, content, status, like_count, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{resourceId}, #{courseId}, #{nodeId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{parentId}, #{rootId}, #{content}, #{status}, #{likeCount}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.select: select count(1) from sc_resource_comment where resource_id = #{resourceId} and status = '0'
